I also noticed your last review was about a month ago. Getting consistent reviews is really important - they make a huge difference when new customers are checking out your profile and deciding whether to book with you.

Meanwhile, please update those 5 leads you received - mark each as booked, not booked, unresponsive, or duplicate. This helps us both track what's happening.

Give me one more month. Let's analyze what we've learned, make real adjustments based on actual data, and move forward with a smarter strategy. I'll work with my finance team to find a fair solution while we do this.
You started this journey because you believed in what you're offering, and I believe in it too.
